text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I notice Mejiro Bright going out of her
way to hide her forehead.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Well, a small pimple has appeared, you see...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I've been eating right and maintaining a proper
daily routine of late, so I wonder how this has
happened.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Setting that aside for the moment, though, I've
come to share something scrumptious with you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Here you are... These macarons are from a cute
little sweet shop that's been in business for
generations. I hope you like them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
They're crunchy to start but soft on the inside,
and pair perfectly with tea. Truth be told, I have
to be careful not to eat too many! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe the sweets are what caused her flare-up?
Either way, it looks like Mejiro Bright's pimple is
bothering her...
